name: Async Queue
description: File-backed async task queue for OpenClaw agents. Schedule delayed tasks between agents with hash-based tracking.
author: ktech99

disclosures: install.sh (must be run manually) registers a background daemon via launchd for persistent task polling
daemon.js uses Node's http module to POST to the local queue-wake plugin endpoint (127.0.0.1:18789 only) — no execSync
Files are written to ~/.openclaw/queue/ (queue state) and ~/.openclaw/extensions/queue-wake/ (plugin)
Agent targets are configured by the user in ~/.openclaw/queue/targets.json — no hard-coded agent names
The /api/queue-wake endpoint uses OpenClaw plugin auth and binds to localhost only
